title: Welcome the Pilgrims
description: Help weary families arriving for Passover find care near the temple gates.

steps.instruction: Speak with the pilgrim elder near the lower court.
Find a filled water skin for the families arriving from the road.
Bring the water skin to the temple gate.

reflection.message: Pilgrimage begins with ordinary care for people who are tired from the road.

title: Listen in the Courts
description: Enter the temple courts and listen carefully before speaking.

steps.instruction: Ask the teacher what the people are discussing.
Observe the circle of teachers in the temple court.

reflection.message: Wisdom is not rushed. It listens, asks, and receives what God is teaching.

title: His Father's House
description: Stand with Mary near the teachers and reflect on Jesus' words with reverence.

steps.instruction: Speak with Mary after the child is found.
Witness the sacred narrative scene in the temple court.

reflection.message: Jesus' words reveal devotion to the Father, while the family returns home in humble obedience.
